summary: Tested Sales Competition Leaderboard feature and INVERTED permission toggle logic. Backend: 9/12 tests passed (3 failures due to missing GET /api/users/{id} endpoint - not critical). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Leaderboard shows cashier rankings with Trophy icon, period buttons (اليوم, الأسبوع, الشهر), and entry details. Permission toggle logic verified: toggle ON = feature VISIBLE, toggle OFF = feature HIDDEN.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed - single user GET not implemented
minor.note: Not critical - can use GET /api/users list endpoint instead

console_errors.error: Error accessing index 'is_synced' in store 'orders': DataError
console_errors.description: IndexedDB error when accessing is_synced index - pre-existing offline sync issue

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/sales-leaderboard endpoint returns correct structure with period, date, leaderboard, total_cashiers
VERIFIED: Leaderboard entries include cashier_id, cashier_name, total_sales, order_count, rank, average_order
VERIFIED: Leaderboard is sorted by total_sales descending with correct rank assignment
VERIFIED: Period filters (today, week, month) work correctly
VERIFIED: Permission toggle logic INVERTED - user?.permissions?.includes('hide_cash_expected') shows element (toggle ON = visible)
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 2243 uses user?.permissions?.includes('hide_cash_expected') WITHOUT '!' prefix

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Leaderboard feature verified working. Permission toggle logic INVERTED and working correctly. Cashier has permissions: ['hide_recent_orders', 'delivery', 'expenses', 'orders', 'hide_cash_expected', 'pos', 'tables']. The leaderboard shows 'غير معروف' as cashier name because orders were created without cashier_name field.
